description: Privacy-first, unofficial WHOOP MCP server for AI health, sleep, recovery, and performance agents.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/whoop-mcp

environmentVariables.description: WHOOP OAuth client ID. Optional when configured with whoop-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: WHOOP OAuth client secret. Prefer whoop-mcp-server setup so this secret is stored in ~/.whoop-mcp/config.json instead of MCP client config.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Redirect URI configured in the WHOOP Developer Dashboard. Optional when configured with whoop-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_REDIRECT_URI

environmentVariables.description: Optional local path for OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.whoop-mcp/tokens.json.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_TOKEN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional payload mode: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to structured. raw means full WHOOP API payloads, not raw device sensor streams.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache toggle. Set to true or sqlite to enable.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_CACHE

environmentVariables.description: Optional local SQLite cache path. Defaults to ~/.whoop-mcp/cache.sqlite.
environmentVariables.name: WHOOP_CACHE_PATH
